name: Taurus Armas S.A.
summary: Taurus Armas S.A., together with its subsidiaries, produces and trades small firearms. The company operates through Firearms and Accessories; and Metal Injection Molding segments. It offers pistols, revolvers, and long weapons, and rifles. The company sells its products in approximately 100 countries under Taurus, Heritage, and Rossi names. Taurus Armas S.A. was founded in 1939 and is headquartered in S√É¬£o Leopoldo, Brazil.
